title: Structures Médiévales
description: A mod that adds medieval structures.
body:
Medieval Structure Mod for Minecraft

This mod adds a series of automatically generated structures to your Minecraft world, making your gameplay more vibrant, immersive, and story-rich. Included in the mod:

🏠 Chic House – A refined and stylish home that may appear in villages or deep in nature.

🏚 Medieval Inn – A large, Middle Ages-inspired building, perfect for deepening your exploration.

🏘 Blue Emblemed House – A distinct aesthetic variation to diversify village architecture.

🏠 Blacksmith’s House – A fully equipped forge workshop, ideal for a medieval atmosphere.

🏨 Creper Inn – A mysterious little inn with hidden stories.

🏰 Nether Portal Structure – A pre-built portal to help you access the Nether quickly and immersively.

🏙 Tavernedumoyen... – Likely a medieval tavern, perfect for imagining quests, meetings, or secrets.

Each structure is generated automatically based on predefined conditions, which ensures that every world you create is unique, coherent, and full of surprises.

💡 Why should you download this mod?
Because it doesn’t just add buildings—it breathes life into your world. It encourages imagination, storytelling, and exploration. If you’ve ever dreamed of a Minecraft world filled with detailed villages and realistic medieval architecture, this mod is a solid starting point for immersive adventures.

🙌 Support and feedback
Creating this mod takes time, motivation, and support. If you’d like to help me continue developing and improving it:

☕ You can support me on Ko-fi (but only if you feel like it!):
https://ko-fi.com/moddon/goal%20?%20G=0

💬 You can share your comments or suggestions here:

(https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeQ7S91hv7zQhMgNLw4VP7SB7eHrryrViKeF0Y0_FZxgeY3Ag/viewform?usp=header)

or join the community on Discord (https://discord.com/invite/xBG9h93m)

💻 Curious about how the mod works? You can view or contribute to the source code on GitHub:

https://github.com/Arth3321/Code-source-mod-minecraft-Structure-M-di-vale
